display.purpose: Globe home hero wordmark only; appears once per session.

headline.purpose: Brand name in Product detail view.

title.purpose: Product name in Product detail view; category labels.

body.purpose: Brand history, intro copy, price text.

label.purpose: All UI chrome: buttons, captions, eyebrows, nav, ticker.

shadows.name: overlay-lift
shadows.purpose: Soft ambient lift for floating, edge-free panels (globe hover-preview card and similar future popovers). Paired with backdrop-filter: blur(12px). Never used on buttons, chips, or tiles.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default hover/transform transitions (150-200ms) across buttons, chips, tiles.

motion.name: ease-overlay
motion.purpose: Overlay entrance (fade-up, scale-in) for Lookbook, Product, and Category Lookbook panels, 280-420ms.

components.name: Primary CTA Button
components.description: Main call-to-action: opens lookbook, confirms filtered view, links out to brand store purchase.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0a0a0a; color: #ffffff; border: none; padding: 14px 32px; font-family: "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 150ms ease, opacity 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.86; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.96); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0a0a0a; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action: clear filters, wishlist, close overlay. Inverts fully to ink on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: #ffffff; color: #0a0a0a; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.30); padding: 12px 16px; font-family: "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease, transform 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #0a0a0a; color: #ffffff; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.96); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0a0a0a; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Close Button
components.description: Dismiss control for every full-screen overlay (Lookbook, Product, Category Lookbook).
components.css: .ds-btn-close { width: 40px; height: 40px; border: 1px solid #000000; background: #ffffff; color: #0a0a0a; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; font-family: "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease, transform 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-close:hover { background: #0a0a0a; color: #ffffff; } .ds-btn-close:active { transform: scale(0.9); }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Multi-select category filter on the Globe home screen. Shows a checkbox glyph, zero-padded count, and label.
components.css: .ds-chip { all: unset; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; padding: 12px 18px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.22); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); cursor: pointer; font-family: "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; transition: background-color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease, transform 150ms ease; } .ds-chip:hover { border-color: #000; } .ds-chip:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-chip-check { width: 16px; height: 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.5); display: inline-flex; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-chip-count { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: #6a6a72; width: 28px; } .ds-chip-label { font-weight: 700; font-size: 18px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #0a0a0a; } .ds-chip.is-active { background: #0a0a0a; border-color: #000; } .ds-chip.is-active .ds-chip-check { background: #fff; border-color: #fff; } .ds-chip.is-active .ds-chip-count { color: #aaaaaa; } .ds-chip.is-active .ds-chip-label { color: #ffffff; }

components.name: Product Tile
components.description: Drag-grid tile showing a product photo with an uppercase name/price caption bar over the bottom edge.
components.html: TOP BRU$53.000
components.css: .ds-tile { position: relative; background: #e8e8e6; overflow: hidden; width: 230px; height: 320px; } .ds-tile-img { position: absolute; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 320ms cubic-bezier(.22,.61,.36,1); } .ds-tile:hover .ds-tile-img { transform: scale(1.06); } .ds-tile-caption { position: absolute; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); padding: 7px 10px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline; gap: 8px; font-family: "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-tile-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; text-transform: uppercase; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-tile-price { font-weight: 500; font-size: 9px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; color: #666666; white-space: nowrap; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Brand Ticker
components.description: Auto-scrolling marquee of all brand names; the only persistent navigation element on the Globe home screen.
components.html: LA MARTIC◆DE GOYA STGO◆
components.css: .ds-ticker { width: 100%; height: 44px; background: #0a0a0a; overflow: hidden; display: flex; align-items: center; } .ds-ticker-track { display: flex; white-space: nowrap; will-change: transform; animation: ds-ticker-scroll 28s linear infinite; } .ds-ticker-item { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding-right: 48px; font-size: 10.5px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 3.5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #ffffff; font-family: "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-ticker-dot { margin-left: 48px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25); font-size: 7px; } @keyframes ds-ticker-scroll { from { transform: translateX(0); } to { transform: translateX(-50%); } }

components.name: Hover Preview Card
components.description: The one floating, edge-free panel in the system; appears beside the globe on spike hover. Sole user of Overlay Lift shadow.
components.html:
LA MARTIC
TOP BRU
$53.000
components.css: .ds-hover-card { width: 250px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.96); border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.14); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.18); font-family: "Helvetica Neue", Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-hover-card-img { width: 100%; height: 280px; overflow: hidden; background: #ececef; } .ds-hover-card-img img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; display: block; } .ds-hover-card-body { padding: 14px 16px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .ds-hover-card-brand { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 1.5px; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6a6a72; margin-bottom: 5px; } .ds-hover-card-name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.3px; text-transform: uppercase; line-height: 1.3; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-hover-card-price { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; }

narrative.overview: PRET-A-CL reads like a black-on-white protest poster, not a storefront: declarative all-caps Helvetica, hairline rules instead of cards, and a globe of black spikes standing in for a product catalogue. The system rejects every retail tell — no sale badges, no rounded pill buttons, no carousels, no pastel softening — because the brand line is explicit: "NO ES RETAIL. ES CULTO." Density is generous (large display type, wide negative space at the globe home) but tightens hard once the user commits to a category or product, where information is delivered as a dense, declarative dossier (brand meta, history, price, single CTA). Depth comes from contrast and hairlines, never from shadow-as-decoration. Motion is restrained and physical — drag-inertia grids, easing curves, no bounce — reinforcing that this is a tool for browsing, not a marketing animation reel.
keyCharacteristics: Pure black ink (#0a0a0a) on pure white paper (#ffffff); no tinted neutrals, no warm cream
Single typeface (Helvetica Neue) carries the entire system — no display/body pairing
Zero border-radius by default; the rare 2px on lookbook tiles is the only softening in the system
Flat by default; the one allowed elevation is a soft lift on floating overlay panels (hover card, hint), never on buttons or tiles
All interactive labels are uppercase and letter-spaced — there is no sentence-case UI copy

rules.name: The Two-Ink Rule
rules.body: The palette is ink and paper. Any third color is a placeholder-grey for unloaded imagery, never a decorative accent. If a screen needs a third brand color, that's a sign the screen has drifted off-system.

rules.name: The All-Caps Chrome Rule
rules.body: Anything that is UI scaffolding rather than content (buttons, captions, eyebrows, nav labels) is uppercase and letter-spaced. Sentence case is reserved for nothing in this system — even body copy is uppercase.

rules.name: The Flat-Unless-Floating Rule
rules.body: If a surface touches the edge of its container (full-bleed overlays, tiles in a grid, buttons in a row), it is flat. If it floats free over other content with no container edge, it gets Overlay Lift. There is no third state.

dos: Do keep the palette to ink (#0a0a0a) and paper (#ffffff), with grey reserved for unloaded-image placeholders only (Tile Grey #e8e8e6, Tile Grey Soft #ececef, Canvas Grey #f4f4f2).
Do set every UI chrome string (buttons, captions, eyebrows, nav labels) in uppercase with letter-spacing — this is the Label role and it is the most-used type role in the system.
Do use 0px border-radius on every button, chip, and grid tile; the 2px tile radius in Category Lookbook is the sole sanctioned exception.
Do invert ink/paper fully on hover for ghost buttons and active chips rather than introducing a tint or accent color.
Do reserve Overlay Lift (0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.18) + blur) for floating, edge-free panels only (the globe hover card and similar future popovers).
donts: Don't build anything that reads as generic e-commerce — no product cards with sale badges, no carousels, no banner promos, no star ratings.
Don't introduce corporate SaaS-cream minimalism — no pastel or cream backgrounds, no gradient-text headlines, no rounded pill buttons.
Don't add shadows to buttons, chips, or grid tiles. Flat-by-default applies everywhere except genuinely floating overlay content.
Don't introduce a second typeface. Helvetica Neue carries display through label.
Don't simulate checkout inside PRET-A-CL. Every purchase path is an outbound link to the brand's own store.
